zh.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood是Alexander Dunbar的兒子，於1310年出生在英國蘇格蘭貝維其可爾。他和Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1356年在義大利馬安科納安科納坎迪亞享年47歲，埋葬在希臘Κρήτη。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood是Alexander Dunbar的儿子，于1310年出生在英国苏格兰貝維其可爾。他和Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1356年在意大利馬安科納安科納坎迪亞享年47岁，埋葬在希腊Κρήτη。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Swinwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Swinford
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, Kent): habitational name from Old Swinford (Worcestershire), Kingswinford (Staffordshire), Swinford (Leicestershire), Swinford in Cumnor (Berkshire), or Swinford in Hothfield (Kent), all of which are recorded Swineford or Swyneford in medieval documents. The placenames derive from Old English swīn ‘swine, pig’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood was born in 1310, in Berwickshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Alexander Dunbar. He had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March. He died about 1356, in Candia, Ancona, Ancona, Marche, Italy, at the age of 47, and was buried in Crete, Greece.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood est né en 1310, à Berwickshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Alexander Dunbar. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March. Il est décédé environ 1356, à Candia, Ancona, Ancona, Marche, Italie, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Kriti, Grèce.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood wurde 1310 in Berwickshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Alexander Dunbar geboren. Er hatte mit Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1356 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Candia, Ancona, Ancona, Marche, Italien und wurde in Kriti, Griechenland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood è nato il nel 1310 nel Berwickshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Alexander Dunbar. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March. Morì circa 1356, nel Candia, Ancona, Ancona, Marche, Italia, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Kriti, Grecia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwoodは1310年にイギリススコットランドバーウィクシュアイアでAlexander Dunbarの息子として生まれた。彼はAgnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and Marchとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1356年にイタリアマルチェアンコナアンコナカンディアで47歳で死去し，ギリシャΚρήτηにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood(은)는 1310년 영국 스코틀랜드 버윅실르에서 Alexander Dunbar의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1356년 이탈리아 마체 앤코나 앤코나 캔디아에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 그리스 Κρήτη에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood nasceu em 1310, em Berwickshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Alexander Dunbar. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1356, em Candia, Ancona, Ancona, Marche, Itália, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Kriti, Grécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood родился в 1310 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Alexander Dunbar. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March. Он умер около 1356 г. в местности кандя, анкона, анкона, марч, Италия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности Κρήτη, Греция.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Patrick Dunbar of Swinwood nació en 1310, en Berwickshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de Alexander Dunbar. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Agnes Randolph Countess of Dunbar and March. Murió aproximadamente 1356, en Candia, Ancona, Ancona, Marche, Italia, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Kriti, Grecia.
